request.intent: Update or create a Codex skill using parallel-first execution, automatic reuse detection, and latest official documentation.
request.notes: Use official OpenAI docs only for behavior-changing facts.

exact_matches.name: skill-update
exact_matches.description: Update or create Codex skills with a parallel-first workflow. Use when you need to benchmark a skill against the latest official docs, detect related existing skills and processes, reuse compatible assets, and produce validated skill patches or a new skill package.

recommendations.reason: Exact existing skill found for 'skill-update'. Update in place unless approval requires a fork.

lanes.name: author-worker
lanes.goal: author or patch the target skill

lanes.name: verifier
lanes.goal: validate outputs and downgrade if parallel support was absent

authoring_rules: Keep SKILL.md concise; move long notes to references/.
Add dry-run gates before destructive steps.
Prefer repo-scoped .agents/skills unless user explicitly wants global install.
Mark unsupported runtime capabilities as degraded instead of pretending they ran.
intent: Update or create a Codex skill using parallel-first execution, automatic reuse detection, and latest official documentation.
